hero.name: Sk. Roushan Khalid
hero.philosophy: "AI/ML Engineer focused on applied machine learning and backend APIs, while exploring AWS cloud hosting."

about.lead: I'm a Software Engineering graduate (B.Sc., Daffodil International University) working as an AI Engineer at Kamal-Paterson Ltd, where I design and ship production AI systems for real-world agritech applications.
paragraphs: My work spans applied machine learning, backend engineering, and LLM-based application development. I build production-grade AI software — focusing on how intelligent systems perform at scale, not just in research environments.

I have hands-on experience across the full AI development lifecycle: from designing RAG pipelines and multi-agent orchestration systems to building full-stack platforms with Flutter, React, and FastAPI backends deployed on PostgreSQL/PostGIS infrastructure.

I thrive in environments that value engineering rigour, continuous learning, and meaningful collaboration. I bring both technical depth and cross-functional awareness — understanding the product and business context around the AI features I build.
focusItems: Scalable system design for AI applications

skills.title: Applied AI & Machine Learning
skills.description: Designing and deploying practical ML systems end-to-end — from data pipelines and feature engineering to model training, evaluation, and production deployment.

skills.title: LLM Applications & RAG
skills.description: Integrating large language models into production applications — retrieval-augmented generation pipelines, intelligent assistants, and multilingual AI interfaces.

skills.title: Multi-Agent & AI Orchestration
skills.description: Architecting multi-agent systems for task automation and structured AI workflows — coordinating specialised agents across planning, execution, and quality-assurance stages.

skills.title: Computer Vision
skills.description: Building applied CV solutions — real-time gesture recognition, image classification pipelines, and domain-specific vision workflows for agritech and health monitoring.

skills.title: Data Engineering & Analytics
skills.description: Structuring data pipelines, building analytical dashboards, and developing intelligent automation systems that surface actionable insights from complex datasets.

skills.title: Backend Systems & APIs
skills.description: Building robust backend infrastructure for AI products — RESTful API design, relational database integration, authentication, and containerised service deployments.

skills.title: AWS & Server Hosting
skills.description: Exploring AWS cloud services and basic server hosting — learning to configure EC2, S3 buckets, RDS databases, and understanding web/app server fundamentals.

skills.title: AI-Augmented Development
skills.description: Proficient in leveraging AI coding tools to accelerate delivery, improve code quality, and prototype solutions faster — deeply integrated into daily engineering workflows.

timeline.title: AI Engineer · Kamal-Paterson Ltd / KPCloud
timeline.description: Developing AI-powered agritech systems spanning full-stack web and mobile applications, backend API infrastructure, computer vision features, and applied AI components. Recently began exploring AWS cloud basics and server hosting to help deploy company products.

timeline.title: Research Intern · Learnix Research Lab
timeline.description: Part-time applied ML research internship focused on bridging academic methodologies with practical implementations. Contributing to research on ML foundations and their translation into production-viable systems.

timeline.title: B.Sc. Software Engineering · Daffodil International University
timeline.description: Major in Data Science. Graduated with a CGPA of 3.62 / 4.00. Developed strong foundations in software engineering principles, data science, and applied AI systems. Active member of the Data Science Club, Software Engineering Club, and BASIS Students' Forum DIU Chapter.

contributions.title: Backend Infrastructure for AI Products
contributions.description: Designing and implementing the API and data layer that AI features depend on — covering database schema design, FastAPI service architecture, authentication, and containerised deployments.

contributions.title: LLM Integration & RAG Pipelines
contributions.description: Building production RAG systems from the ground up — document ingestion, vector indexing, retrieval optimisation, prompt engineering, and end-to-end integration with user-facing APIs.

contributions.title: Data Engineering & AI Workflow Design
contributions.description: Structuring robust data pipelines, building intelligent automation workflows, and integrating external data sources — including weather APIs, geospatial datasets, and time-series feeds — into AI systems.

contributions.title: AI Feature Research & Development
contributions.description: Contributing to AI feature R&D cycles — rapid prototyping, model evaluation, iterative refinement, and translating research outcomes into working, production-ready implementations.

contributions.title: Cross-Domain Technical Thinking
contributions.description: Delivering across agritech, healthcare data, and smart farming domains. Capable of reasoning about the broader product and business context surrounding AI features, not only the model layer.

contributions.title: Rapid Skill Acquisition & Adaptability
contributions.description: Demonstrated ability to ramp up on new tools, frameworks, and problem domains quickly. Shipped production code across Python, Dart, React, PHP, and SQL — adaptability is a core professional asset.

philosophy.title: Build to Learn
philosophy.description: The most effective path to understanding a system is to ship it, stress-test it, and iterate. Theory without practice has limited value in engineering.

philosophy.title: Simplicity as a Design Principle
philosophy.description: Complexity should be introduced only when simpler approaches have been exhausted. A clean, maintainable solution always outperforms an over-engineered one.

philosophy.title: Consistency Compounds
philosophy.description: Sustained, deliberate progress over time outperforms sporadic bursts of effort. Reliability and discipline are the foundation of lasting technical growth.

philosophy.title: Impact Over Innovation Theatre
philosophy.description: AI has value only when it solves real problems for real users. I focus on systems that work in practice — not on technology for its own sake.

contact.footerNote: Based in Dhaka, Bangladesh · Open to remote and onsite opportunities
